package rulefixtures

// scenario for likely_n_squared_allocation: Opt-in deeper semantic signal for allocations that also sit inside nested loop structure.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule612PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario612Positive(records []Rule612PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
